name: direct-truth
description: Kapil Gupta's Direct Truth — a direct perception and self-inquiry toolkit using aphorisms to cut through the mind's illusions about success, mastery, relationships, happiness, and the nature of reality. Uncompromising, non-prescriptive, and radically honest.
useCase: See the truth about life, mind, and mastery — directly, without methods, practices, or prescriptions.
knownRisks: Kapil Gupta's approach rejects all methods and practices — it may destabilize those who depend on 'how-to' guidance
The radical non-prescriptive stance can be frustrating for readers seeking practical help
Some of Gupta's aphorisms may feel nihilistic or dismissive of genuine suffering
